name: aislop
desc: Catch the slop AI coding agents leave in your code: narrative comments, swallowed exceptions, as-any casts, dead code, oversized functions. 50+ rules across 8 …
descFull: Catch the slop AI coding agents leave in your code: narrative comments, swallowed exceptions, as-any casts, dead code, oversized functions. 50+ rules across 8 languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP). Sub-second, deterministic, no LLM at runtime. MIT-licensed.
